name: Abpro Holdings, Inc.
business: Abpro Holdings, Inc. is a biotechnology company dedicated to developing next-generation antibody therapeutics to improve the lives of patients with severe and life-threatening diseases. The Company is focused on the development of novel antibodies using its proprietary discovery and engineering platforms, primarily in the areas of immuno-oncology, ophthalmology and infectious disease. The Company's two lead product candidates, ABP-102 and ABP-201, feature its next generation tetravalent antibody format.
sellsTo: patients with wet age-related macular degeneration (Wet AMD)
patients with severe and life-threatening diseases

exposures.sentence: Abpro Holdings, Inc. (together with its subsidiaries, the Company ) is a biotechnology company dedicated to developing next-generation antibody therapeutics to improve the lives of patients with severe and life-threatening diseases.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance of IND for ABP-102/CT-P72
catalysts.sentence: On January 6, 2026, the Company, together with its co-development partner Celltrion, Inc., was notified that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has cleared the Investigational New Drug (IND) application for ABP-102 / CT-P72, The Company s lead multispecific antibody oncology program.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1/2 clinical trial of ABP-102
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a Phase 1/2 clinical trial of ABP-102 with our partner Celltrion in the first half of 2026, focusing on HER2+ breast and gastric cancers.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical trial of ABP-201
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, we are planning to advance ABP-201 into Phase 1 clinical trials in the second half of 2026 for the treatment of Wet AMD.

catalysts.event: Initiation of clinical trials for ABP-110
catalysts.sentence: We expect to initiate clinical trials for ABP-110 in the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Initiation of clinical trials for ABP-150
catalysts.sentence: We expect to initiate clinical trials for ABP-150 in the first half of 2027.

tamClaims.claim: Global HER2+ market forecast to grow to $12.1 billion by 2030 at a CAGR of 1.5%
tamClaims.sentence: The global HER2+ market is forecast to grow to $12.1 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 1.5%, according to Research and Markets.

tamClaims.claim: Global liver cancer therapeutics market projected to reach $12.9 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: According to SNS Insider, the global liver cancer therapeutics market is projected to reach $12.9 billion by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Global gastric cancer market projected to reach $13.1 billion by 2029
tamClaims.sentence: According to Data Bridge Market Research, the global gastric cancer market is projected to reach $13.1 billion by 2029.
